experiences.description: Founder of Delify, a premium international candy e-commerce brand. Led the end-to-end development of the online store, digital marketing strategy, and customer experience. Achieved consistent revenue growth through product curation, social media positioning, and the integration of AI-powered operational tools.

Deployment of an AI-powered operations manager in production, integrating WhatsApp, real-time scraping, and persistence in Docker (PostgreSQL/ChromaDB). Implemented a Tool-First Architecture to eliminate model hallucinations, ensuring robustness and reliability in live environments.

Designed a trading platform integrating Coinglass data via proprietary scraper, eliminating API costs. Built a custom ETL pipeline ("datasetcreator") to generate high-quality datasets for fine-tuning AI models (R1). Implemented a two-tier AI architecture: Orchestrator (large LLM) + Specialist (fine-tuned model) to optimize costs and accuracy.

experiences.position: Strategic Pivot: Legal Agentic System (Independent R&D)
experiences.description: Conducted a strategic post-mortem that concluded trading bots were limited by capital and latency. Re-engineered the agentic + RAG architecture and applied it to Legal AI, a domain with more accessible technological barriers. Demonstrated adaptability and maturity by reallocating technical resources toward a higher-viability opportunity.

experiences.position: Local AI Lab on RunPod (Infrastructure for Experimentation)
experiences.description: Deployed a dockerized AI stack on RunPod (NVIDIA 3090) as a personal R&D engine. Orchestrated multiple models in synergy: a distilled LLM (R1), an embeddings model (Qwen3), and a reranker (Qwen3). Used a local chatbot as a testing ground to validate architectures before production deployment.

experiences.position: Cloud Deployment: "RecApp" in Azure (Enterprise Proof of Concept)
experiences.description: Developed an intelligent insurance policy consultant using GPT-5-Mini on Azure. Designed an Intention Router to orchestrate specialized AI agents, applying the role of AI Orchestrator in an enterprise context.
